info.title: SIM PROKER API
info.description:
Program Kerja Information System — REST API Documentation.

This service manages program planning, activity management, output tracking, progress monitoring, evidence management, and approval workflows.

**Authentication**: All endpoints require a valid JWT Bearer token from Auth Service.

tags.description: APIs for SIM IKU and other microservices
